<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Domeneshop](https://domene.shop) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/domeneshop/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "domeneshop"
  dnsCredentials:
    # DOMENESHOP_API_SECRET: API secret
    apiSecret: ""
    # DOMENESHOP_API_TOKEN: API token
    apiToken: ""
    # DOMENESHOP_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 20)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # DOMENESHOP_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 300)
    propagationTimeout: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
